personas: Motivated Maria – a user seeking positive motivation with a playful twist, values clear distinction between tones and quick feedback.
Developer Daniel – backend developer responsible for API integration, focusing on asynchronous calls, error handling, and security.
Maintainer Marta – system maintainer focused on modularity and ease of maintenance.
key_flows: User inputs three words → system validates inputs → system generates motivational phrase and satirical phrase asynchronously → phrases displayed side-by-side → user reads phrases with clear tone distinction.

Developer triggers POST /api/motivational-phrase with three words → backend validates input → calls ChatGPT API asynchronously to generate satirical phrase → handles errors gracefully → returns both phrases in response.
Maintainer updates satirical phrase generation module independently without affecting motivational phrase logic.
friction_points: User entering invalid or malicious input causing validation errors or security risks.
Delay in satirical phrase generation causing increased response time and poor user experience.
User confusion due to insufficient visual distinction between motivational and satirical phrases.
Error in satirical phrase generation causing loss of satirical phrase without informing user.

information_architecture.hierarchy: Primary focus on input form for three words at top, followed immediately by side-by-side display of motivational and satirical phrases. Error messages and status indicators appear near input area to provide immediate feedback.
navigation: Home – main page with input and generated phrases
Help/FAQ – guidance on input rules and error handling
Settings (optional) – manage API keys or preferences for maintainers/developers
categorization: User Input – the three words input form
Generated Content – motivational phrase and satirical phrase
System Feedback – validation errors, API status messages, loading states

components: Input form with three validated text inputs and Submit button
Left column: Motivational phrase display area
Right column: Satirical phrase display area

responsive.mobile: Stacked vertical layout: input form on top, motivational phrase below, satirical phrase below motivational phrase, each full width with spacing to separate clearly.
responsive.tablet: Two-column layout with motivational and satirical phrases side-by-side beneath input form, input form full width above columns.
responsive.desktop: Two-column layout with input form spanning top full width, beneath which motivational phrase on left and satirical phrase on right with equal width and aligned vertically.

design_system.typography: Primary font: Sans-serif (e.g., Inter or Roboto) with sizes ranging from 16px (body) to 24px (headings). Use font-weight 600 for phrase titles. Line-height 1.5 for readability.
design_system.colors: Color palette includes: primary blue (#1a73e8) for buttons and highlights, green (#2e7d32) for motivational phrase text, red/orange (#d84315) for satirical phrase text, neutral greys (#f5f5f5 background, #333 text), error red (#b00020) for validation and API errors.
design_system.spacing: Base spacing scale increments of 8px: small (8px), medium (16px), large (24px), extra large (32px). Consistent padding inside input fields and phrase containers, margin between columns and sections.
components: Validated input fields with inline error states
Primary call-to-action button with hover and disabled states
Phrase display cards with distinct background and border colors for motivational vs satirical

accessibility.keyboard_nav: All interactive elements (inputs, buttons) must be reachable and operable via keyboard in logical tab order. Visible focus indicators on all focusable elements.
accessibility.screen_reader: Use semantic HTML and ARIA roles where appropriate. Provide clear labels for inputs and status messages. Announce error messages and loading states dynamically using ARIA live regions.
accessibility.contrast_ratio: Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for text against background, including motivational and satirical phrase text colors ensuring readability.

states: default: normal input and button appearance
hover: button background darkens, pointer cursor
disabled: button and inputs visibly disabled with muted colors
error: input border and error message in red, error icon appears
interactions.animations: Subtle fade-in transition for generated phrases on load (duration ~300ms). Button hover and focus transitions smooth over 150ms. Loading spinner rotates continuously.
interactions.loading_state: After submission, disable input and submit button, show spinner next to button and a subtle message 'Generating phrases...'. Loading state announced to screen readers.
interactions.empty_state: Before submission or after error, motivational and satirical phrase areas show placeholder text 'Your phrases will appear here' in muted grey italic font.
